notes:
v2.1.3 Update
⚡ Currency Definitions: Currency editing now lives in GlitchSmith Library's unified dialog, shared across every GlitchSmith module.
⚡ New "Configure Currencies" menu at module level opens the library dialog directly from settings.
⚡ Persistent notification appears if GlitchSmith Library is somehow disabled.

announcement.title: 📱 Smartphone Widget v2.1.3
announcement.content:
Smartphone Widget v2.1.3 is ready.

This release plugs into GlitchSmith Library 0.3.0+. Currency editing now lives in the library's unified dialog, shared across every GlitchSmith module.

  • Currency Definitions: The Currency Manager Admin's Currency tab gains an "Open Currency Definitions" button that opens the library dialog. Banks and Accounts tabs are unchanged.
  • Configure Currencies Menu: A new menu entry at module level opens the same dialog directly from Smartphone Widget's settings.
  • Library Activation Check: A persistent notification appears if GlitchSmith Library is somehow disabled.
